_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of responsible use principles and practices
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of compliance assessment methodologies, including control testing, evidence gathering, gap analysis, and findings documentation standards.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI RC domain. Knowledge RC-K-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-K-010 (DG, cosine: 0.537), DG-K-008 (DG, cosine: 0.517).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.505). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. NICE-only terms [practices, principles, responsible, use] vs WIDAI-only terms [analysis, assessment, compliance, control, documentation, evidence] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.876 (P=0.898, R=0.855). P exceeds R by 0.043 — the NICE element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 16 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Knowledge of responsible use principles and practices" and "Knowledge of compliance assessment methodologies, including control testing, evi" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.580 > STS 0.505 (gap +0.076). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.0%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. NICE-only: [practices, principles, responsible, use]. WIDAI-only: [analysis, assessment, compliance, control, documentation, evidence].

signals.detail: STS 0.505 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
